about.title: About Tidiane
about.p1: Tidiane Kane, founder of TKA driver, has been driving in Paris and the Île-de-France region for years.
about.p2: He founded KT to offer an accessible private chauffeur service with no surprises and real quality standards: punctuality, courtesy, immaculate car.
about.p3: His approach: turn every ride into a pleasant moment, whether for an early flight or an important meeting. No jargon, no hidden fees.

items.a: Get a quote online, choose your time slot and pay in a few clicks. You receive an instant confirmation by email.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Stripe. Full payment is taken at booking, in euros.
Free cancellation up to 24h before pickup. Between 24h and 6h before, 50% refunded. Less than 6h before, no refund. In case of flight delay, no fee applies.

items.q: How much luggage can I bring?
items.a: Up to 4 standard pieces (cabin + checked per passenger) in the Toyota Corolla. For larger volumes, contact us.

items.q: What if my flight is delayed?
items.a: We track your flight in real time. In case of delay, the driver adapts at no extra cost. Add your flight number to the booking note.

items.q: Does the driver wait if I'm late?
items.a: 15 minutes of free wait time on standard pickups, 60 minutes on flights. Beyond that, waiting is billed at €0.50/min.

items.q: Do you cover long distances and international?
items.a: Yes: Deauville, Lille, Reims, Brussels and many more on quote. See our packages or get in touch.

footer.tagline: Professional private chauffeur in Paris and Île-de-France.
